staying-still.title: Kugara Wakadzikama
staying-still.description: Nei zvakakosha pakunaka kwe scan yako

video.noVideo: Vhidhiyo iyi haisati yavapo pari zvino

what-is-ct: Inoshandisa X-ray kuti iburitse mifananidzo yemukati memuviri wako
Litaibula rinofamba zvishoma nezvishoma muringi yakakura — haupindi mumugero
Mushini unoita ruzha rwekurira uye kudzvanya — izvi zvakajairika
prepare: Bvisa zvese zvesimbi — zvishongo, mabhande, mapini ebvudzi, zvipfeko zvemukati zvinesimbi
Pfeka hembe dzakasununguka, dzakajeka — unogona kupihwa nguo yechipatara
Udza chiremba kana uri pamuviri kana uchifunga kuti unahwo
Kana uchifanira kuwana contrast dye — usadye kwemaawa 4 usati wascan
breathhold: Uchanzwa inzwi rakarekodhwa richiti: fema unopinza mweya, bata mweya wako
Gara wakadzikama kwemasekonzi mashanu kusvika 10 — usafeme kana kumedza
Zvino uchanzwa: fema zvakasununguka — uye unogona kuzorora
Dzidzira izvi zvino pa fomu rekudzidzisa pane inotevera screen
contrast: Mujovo wemvura inojekesa uchaiswa mutsinga yako nepakati petsono diki
Uchanzwa kupisa kuchiwedzera mumuviri wako wese — izvi zvakajairika
Unogona kunzwa kuda kuenda kuchimbuzi — manzwiro aya anopera nekukurumidza
Udza chiremba nekukurumidza kana ukanzwa kuvaviwa, kupedzerwa mweya wakaderera, kana kurwara
staying-still: Kufamba kudikitiki kunokanganisa mifananidzo uye kudzima scan
Mifananidzo ine mhute inoreva kuti scan inofanira kudzokororwa — imwe nguva uye imwe radiation
Isa maoko ako panhivi dzako kana padumbu pako — chero zvakanyanya kureruka
Vhara maziso ako, fema zvishoma nezvishoma, uye edza kuzorodza muviri wako wese

breathhold.title: Kudzidzira Kubata Mweya
breathhold.subtitle: Dzidzira usati wapinda mumba me scanner
breathhold.completeSub: Iye zvino unogona kutevera murairo wokubata mweya panguva yescan yako
breathhold.tip: Panguva yescan chaiyo, chiremba achakupa iwo mirau imwe chete

visual.title: Purangwe Rwekutaurirana
visual.subtitle: Bata kadhi kuratidza chiremba manzwiro aunoita
visual.tapToShow: Bata kana kadhi ripi kugadzira kuti rive kubwa pascreen ese

feedback.title: Wakanzwa Sei Nechiitiko Chako?
feedback.subtitle: Mhinduro dzako dzakavanzika uye dzinotibatsira kuvandudza
feedback.anxietyBefore: Wakanzwa kutya kwakadii usati watarisa mavhidhiyo?
feedback.anxietyAfter: Iye zvino inonzwa sei mushure mekutarisa?
feedback.understood: Unonzwa sokuti unonzwisisa zvinoitika panguva ye CT scan yako here?
feedback.thankyouSub: Mhinduro dzako dzinotibatsira kuvandudza hutarisiro hwevarwere vese pachipatara chino

notes.commentsPlaceholder: Zvingasarudzwa — chero zvaunocherechedza pamusoro pe scan iyi
